title: DROP-IN DAY SERVICES - 211info
text: YOUTH OPPORTUNITY CENTER DROP-IN DAY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers access to showers, laundry, clothes, computers, internet, and supportive advocates. Hosts regular activities where youth can access resources, explore their artistic talents, join recreation groups, and learn new skills. Also connects youth to other services like education, job training, employment, housing, LGBTQIA2S+ supports, and more. 470 SE 165th Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Ages 9-24 homeless and at-risk youth Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm Email (503) 432-3986 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 754-4350 Main phone Main phone (503) 432-3986 Access Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Community Meals * Homeless Youth General Clothing Provision * Homeless Youth Homeless Drop In Centers * At Risk Youth Laundry Facilities * Homeless Youth Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homeless Youth Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Youth Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Youth Specialized Information and Referral * At Risk Youth Specialized Information and Referral * Homeless Youth Temporary Mailing Address * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ALBA COLLABORATIVE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH OPPORTUNITY CENTER
